meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalls
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn how to implement high-conversion user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' cycle stems from feature creep and lack of user clarity. By implementing a standardized, automated onboarding flow, you force project boundaries, reduce support tickets, and provide an immediate 'win' for your clients. This structure creates a repeatable framework that turns stalled projects into shippable, profitable assets.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished codebase, the deadline is creeping closer, and the client’s feedback loop has turned into a labyrinth of 'what-ifs.' The paralyzing weight of an unfinished project isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of focus on the user's first sixty seconds. When you don't know how to guide a user, you don't know where the project ends.

Shift your perspective: treat onboarding as your project’s finish line. By architecting a seamless, automated welcome experience, you define the core scope, eliminate ambiguity, and build a modular system that clients love. It’s time to move from endless iteration to high-velocity shipping with the help of modern AI-augmented workflows.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves value to the user. This anchors the scope and prevents feature creep.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user journey map for a SaaS onboarding flow that guides a user to the primary value proposition in under 3 clicks. Focus on minimalist UI patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a JSON schema for a 3-step onboarding state machine'

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Build a robust state machine to manage user progress, ensuring the onboarding flow is resilient and restartable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine implementation using XState to track onboarding progress, including persistence to localStorage.

steps.title: Build the Interactive Walkthrough
steps.description: Implement a non-intrusive, step-by-step UI component that highlights core features without overwhelming the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable 'CoachMark' component in Tailwind CSS that anchors to DOM elements and supports keyboard navigation.

steps.title: Integrate Data Analytics Hook
steps.description: Track where users drop off in the onboarding flow to provide data-driven insights to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom React hook 'useOnboardingTracker' that sends events to a mock analytics endpoint on every step completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a telemetry service for onboarding event tracking'

steps.title: Automate Final Deployment
steps.description: Use Claude Code to package the onboarding module into a deployable micro-frontend that can be dropped into any client project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding module into a standalone library structure with clean exports and documentation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude build 'package onboarding-lib for npm distribution'

pro_tips: Always gate your onboarding behind a feature flag so you can disable it instantly if the client changes their mind.
Use 'optimistic UI' for onboarding states to make the application feel instantaneous even during API latency.
Never force more than 3 steps; if you need more, you are building a tutorial, not onboarding.
Include a 'Skip' button that is as prominent as the 'Next' button to respect power users.
Store onboarding progress in a database, not just local storage, so users can switch devices without losing their place.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, run a session with a test user to identify drop-off points, then use Claude Code to iterate on the copy of the weakest step.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting incomplete projects drain your freelance revenue. Implement this onboarding framework today to deliver professional, high-value experiences that keep clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
